title: Junior SEO Specialist at Axe India

jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Axe India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate SEO Specialist with drive and ambition, Axe India in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Axe India:
Axe India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axe India!
